channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 20th March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped on rear access lane and pavement. Blocking access to properties.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Union Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: One purple sack, 6 gas bottles and two a metal rail, 20th March
item.description:
I am a street friend and have collected One purple sack, 6 gas bottles and two a metal rail. All opposite 73 New Street Hill for collection please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Street Hill, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken kerbstone at bus stop C is a trip hazard when boarding buses, 20th March
item.description:
Very dangerous broken and tipped up kerb here - by bus stop C, towards Palmers Green. Broken for more than three months. Safety barrier placed around, but immediately blown down in storm making footpath more hazardous. Kerbstone is tipped over and cannot be crossed to board or dismount. Buses now stop a long way beyond or behind it, as either their front or back door lands beside the broken kerbstone. Bus 299 to Muswell Hill, every 15 mins, yesterday 19th March, did not stop at all and sailed past waiting passengers. This is a very hazardous situation and needs prompt repair.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Access Road From High Street To Station Parade, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Textiles suitcases dumpef, 20th March
item.description:
A woman parked on the pavement and unloaded her boot of suitcases and I assume textiles

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Creter in middle of cross roads junction on hook lane and yorkland Avenue, 20th March
item.description:
Hole in middle of raid for past 2 weeks. Its getting bigger and now tow smaller ones have appeared too

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yorkland Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 lamps out - across the road from each other, 20th March
item.description:
Lamps out
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5a, More London Place, The Borough, Greater London

item.category: All out - three or more street lights in a row

item.title: Two red sacks of garden waste dumped, 20th March

item.title: Fence put up by inspire on the boundary needs fixing also bush is causing fence to bow., 20th March
item.description:
Inspire installed fence on the outside of my boundary there is a bush that has grown between my boundary and the installed fence. This will need removing and fence replacing with the slope at the end so I can see off the drive. This fence is broken and is in the eye line of a child if they came running around the corner.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitehall Lane, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car Parker on the sidewalk, 20th March
item.description:
The car is parked on sidewalk, complete blocked it. I was with my baby in the stroller and had to either take the stroller in the road or to walk with the stroller over grass and outside someones house

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Argent Street, South Stifford, Grays
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By the bus stop outside 154 Willesden Lane, 20th March
item.description:
Trolly, litter

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag
